nodes.name: Fetch RevOps Events
nodes.notes: Fetches all events from RevOps calendar (next 14 days).

nodes.name: Fetch Client Events
nodes.notes: Fetches all events from Blackthorn client calendar (next 14 days).

nodes.name: Compute Diff & Build Actions
nodes.notes: Computes diff between real and synced events on both calendars. Outputs one item per API action needed (POST/PATCH/DELETE), with direction, method, URL, and body. Anti-loop: events tagged with syncSource are never re-synced.

nodes.name: Route by Direction
nodes.notes: Routes actions: TRUE = write to client calendar, FALSE = write to RevOps calendar (or no-op).

nodes.name: Write to Client Calendar
nodes.notes: Executes create/update/delete on client calendar. Method and URL are dynamic per item from the diff node.

nodes.name: Write to RevOps Calendar
nodes.notes: Executes create/update/delete on RevOps calendar. Method and URL are dynamic per item from the diff node.
